payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands or delete memory cards. No memories were created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a durable personal memory fact to store.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No existing memory was modified or deleted.

repair_options: If you intended to delete your own memory data, use an authorized user-facing delete or forget command.
If you are an administrator, authenticate through the proper admin interface before performing administrative operations.
